steps.title: Identify the key constraint
steps.content: The decisive clue is “has been very positive,” which tells us we need a noun that can be positive and is supported by the passage—reviewers praised the book, and it won an award.

steps.title: Match the noun
steps.content:
“Reception” — how something is received or responded to — fits perfectly here. “The reception of the book has been very positive” means the book was positively received by reviewers and the literary community, matching the evidence about praise and the award. The other three choices either contradict the positive context or don't complete the structure meaningfully.

That matches choice C — C is correct.
